subject: ASAP: Java Developer – Java
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Digitalsverige, a company in the public sector space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Java Developer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:

  • Java
  • GCP
  • Kubernetes
  • RabbitMQ

Practical details:

  • Start: ASAP
  • Duration: 12 months
  • Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
  • Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Emma Andersson
Recruitment Consultant
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 76 901 23 45
